package rulefixtures

// scenario for slice_membership_in_loop_map_candidate: slices.Contains(...) or slices.Index(...) used inside loops against a stable-looking slice binding.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: hot_path; severity: info.
type Rule364PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario364Positive(records []Rule364PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
